FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Irrigation Ditch
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A network of channels that brings water to the fields, boosting food output.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Aqueduct System
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A stone-lined aqueduct that delivers a steady flow of water across the farmland, greatly increasing food yields.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Reservoir Network
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A system of interconnected reservoirs that stores and distributes water across all growing zones, maximizing food production. Requires power to operate pumping stations.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Hydroponics Wing
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A climate-controlled greenhouse using hydroponic growing systems. Produces excellent food yields with an efficiency multiplier, but requires significant power.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Terraced Fields
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: Carefully sculpted terraces that make use of hillside land, boosting food output and providing a pleasant landscape for workers.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Fertile Fields
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: Carefully enriched farmland that amplifies all food production.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Enriched Soil
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: Soil enriched with carefully balanced nutrients that significantly boosts crop yields across the farm.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: GMO Crops
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: Genetically modified crop strains engineered for maximum yield. Requires a steady stream of research data to maintain the program.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Crop Rotation
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A systematic rotation of crops that improves soil health, providing both a multiplier to existing yields and additional food output.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Agricultural Science Center
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A research-driven agricultural facility that combines crop science with practical farming for outstanding yields. Requires ongoing research input.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Deep Mine Shaft
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: An extended mine shaft that reaches deeper ore deposits.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Reinforced Tunnels
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: Timber-braced tunnels that allow miners to safely access richer veins deep underground. Requires a steady supply of lumber.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Strip Mine
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A large-scale open-pit mining operation that extracts vast quantities of ore using powered equipment. Requires industrial technology and power.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Surveyor's Outpost
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A well-organized surveying station that improves mining efficiency and reduces worker unrest through better planning.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Ore Refinery
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A processing facility that refines raw ore into higher-quality materials.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Smelting Works
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A large smelting facility with multiple furnaces that greatly improves ore processing efficiency.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Automated Smelter
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A fully automated smelting facility that processes ore around the clock with minimal oversight. Requires power to operate.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Ore Grading Station
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A sorting facility that grades ore by quality, improving both refining efficiency and tax revenue from premium materials.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Sawmill
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A mechanical sawmill that speeds up timber processing.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Steam Sawmill
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A power-driven sawmill that processes timber far faster than manual methods. Requires a modest power supply.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Industrial Mill
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A fully mechanized lumber mill with conveyor systems and automated cutting. Requires significant power to operate.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Forestry Office
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A well-managed office that coordinates logging operations sustainably, improving output and worker satisfaction.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Nature Reserve
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A managed woodland reserve that balances sustainable logging with conservation, greatly improving worker morale.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Timber Yard
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: An organized yard for curing and storing timber, improving overall logging efficiency.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Curing Facility
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A specialized facility for drying and treating lumber, producing higher-quality timber that fetches better prices.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Lumber Processing Plant
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: An industrial-scale lumber processing facility with power-driven planers and kilns. Requires a steady power supply.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Timber Exchange
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A trading post that connects the lumber camp to regional markets, improving logging efficiency and tax revenue.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Breeding Pens
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: Enclosed pens designed for controlled breeding programs.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Pastoral Fields
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: Expansive grazing pastures with improved fencing and water troughs. Requires a steady food supply for supplemental feeding.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Industrial Ranching Complex
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A large-scale livestock operation with automated feeding systems and climate-controlled housing. Requires food and power.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Game Reserve
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A managed wildlife reserve that produces animal products while providing a pleasant environment for workers.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Veterinary Post
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A small clinic that keeps animals healthy and productive.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Animal Hospital
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A full-service animal hospital with surgical facilities and quarantine areas. Requires a supply of medicine.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Genetics Laboratory
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A cutting-edge facility for selective breeding and genetic analysis, dramatically improving livestock quality. Requires medicine and power.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Livestock Fair
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A regional fair that showcases the ranch's finest animals, boosting production efficiency, morale, and tax revenue.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Distillation Column
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A tall fractional distillation column that extracts more chemfuel from raw biomass.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Fractional Still
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: An advanced distillation apparatus that separates chemfuel components with greater precision. Requires power to maintain operating temperatures.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Chemical Plant
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A full-scale industrial chemical processing facility. Requires significant power and a supply of raw minerals.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Biomass Converter
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A converter that processes organic waste into chemfuel. Requires a supply of food as feedstock.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Biodigester
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: An industrial biodigester that converts large quantities of organic material into chemfuel through anaerobic decomposition. Requires food and animal products.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Cracking Tower
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A catalytic cracking facility that dramatically improves chemfuel yield.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Catalytic Cracker
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A high-efficiency catalytic cracking unit that breaks down heavy hydrocarbons into usable chemfuel. Requires power.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Petrochemical Complex
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A sprawling industrial complex that processes raw materials into chemfuel at maximum efficiency. Requires significant power.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Fuel Depot
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A secure storage facility for chemfuel reserves, improving production efficiency and providing additional stockpile capacity.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Herb Garden
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A carefully tended garden of medicinal plants that boosts medicine output.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Medicinal Greenhouse
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A controlled greenhouse environment for growing rare medicinal herbs year-round. Requires food as a growing medium.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Pharmaceutical Laboratory
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: An advanced laboratory for synthesizing and refining medicinal compounds. Requires power and food-based raw materials.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Healer's Sanctuary
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A peaceful sanctuary where healers practice traditional medicine, boosting both medicine output and worker happiness.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Wellness Center
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A holistic wellness facility that combines traditional healing with modern comforts, improving medicine output, happiness, and prosperity.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Apothecary
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A workshop for preparing and refining herbal remedies, improving overall medicine production.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Compounding Pharmacy
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A specialized pharmacy that compounds custom medicinal preparations, improving overall medicine efficiency. Requires food-based ingredients.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Biotech Clinic
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A high-tech medical clinic using biotechnology to produce advanced medicines. Requires power to operate its equipment.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Herbal Export Office
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A trade office that markets herbal products to distant buyers, improving production efficiency and tax revenue.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Generator
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A basic power generator that increases the settlement's energy output.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Turbine Hall
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A large facility housing fuel-burning turbines for power generation. Requires a steady supply of chemfuel.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Fusion Reactor
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A spacer-tech fusion reactor that generates enormous amounts of power. Requires a large supply of chemfuel for plasma ignition.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Wind Farm
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A cluster of wind turbines that harness natural air currents to generate clean power with minimal upkeep.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Solar Array
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A large array of solar panels that converts sunlight into substantial electrical power with very low maintenance costs.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Transformer Station
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A power distribution facility that amplifies total energy output.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Power Grid Hub
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A centralized grid management hub that optimizes power distribution across the settlement. Requires mined materials for maintenance.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Smart Grid
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: An intelligent power grid with automated load balancing and predictive distribution algorithms. Requires mined materials for component fabrication.

FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.label: Capacitor Bank
FactionColonies.BuildingFCDef.desc: A large bank of capacitors that smooths power delivery and provides additional storage capacity, improving overall grid efficiency.
